zh.title: 狗狗币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
当前DOGE/USD整体处于短线偏弱震荡结构，价格0.07335仍低于20日均线0.07582，说明反弹后承压，趋势尚未转强，空头仍占主导。

MACD指标为负值且快线低于信号线，动能偏空；但24小时涨2.4%显示短线反弹力量仍在，尚未形成趋势反转确认。

下方支撑0.0716附近，上方阻力0.0738及0.0758均线，突破均线前仍以震荡为主。

短线建议以反弹高抛为主，未站稳0.0758前谨慎追多，可在支撑附近轻仓试多并设严格止损。

en.title: Dogecoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
DOGE/USD is currently in a short-term corrective structure despite a modest 24h gain of 2.40%. Price at 0.07335 remains below the 20-day SMA at 0.07582, indicating the broader near-term trend is still bearish-to-neutral. Recent price action shows a rebound from 0.07164, but the recovery lacks strong follow-through. Overall structure suggests consolidation after downside pressure rather than a confirmed bullish reversal, with traders still awaiting a decisive breakout.

Momentum indicators continue to lean bearish. The MACD reading of -0.000764 confirms that downside momentum has not fully dissipated, and upside attempts remain relatively weak. Without RSI data, price behavior relative to moving averages becomes more important, and trading below the 20-day SMA reinforces seller dominance. Any bullish momentum observed so far appears corrective rather than impulsive, suggesting the market is still in a distribution-to-consolidation phase.

Immediate support is at 0.07164, the recent 24-hour low, with secondary psychological support near 0.0700 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance sits at 0.07384, followed by stronger dynamic resistance at the 20-day SMA around 0.07582. A break above the SMA would be required to signal potential trend reversal and open path toward recovery attempts toward higher short-term resistance zones.

The pair favors range-bound, mean-reversion strategies until a clear breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight stops below 0.0710, targeting moves toward 0.0758 resistance. Failure to hold 0.0716 increases downside risk and may extend declines. Swing traders should wait for a confirmed close above the 20-day SMA before positioning for trend continuation.
